vibe: Uber-style utility app. Extremely straightforward, high-contrast, large touch targets, minimal visual noise, map-centric when applicable.

primary.usage: Main CTAs, Primary Actions (e.g., 'Solicitar Recolección', 'Confirmar'). MUST use black text (text-black or text-gray-900) on top for contrast.

secondary.usage: Recycler specific actions, progress indicators, active states, map markers. Use white text (text-white) on top for contrast.

layout.strategy: Mobile-First App Shell. The entire application MUST be constrained to a mobile viewport even on desktop.
layout.app_shell_classes: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] bg-gray-50 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col shadow-2xl sm:border sm:border-gray-200
layout.spacing: Use generous padding: p-4 or p-6 for main containers. Gap-4 between list items.
layout.navigation: Use a fixed Bottom Navigation Bar for main routing (Home, History, Profile). No complex sidebars.
layout.modals: Slide-up Bottom Sheets (rounded-t-3xl) instead of centered modals, for an app-native feel.

buttons.primary: w-full h-14 rounded-2xl bg-[#C8F135] text-gray-900 font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-transform active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-50
buttons.secondary: w-full h-14 rounded-2xl bg-[#2BBFB3] text-white font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-transform active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-50
buttons.outline: w-full h-14 rounded-2xl bg-white border-2 border-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center active:bg-gray-50

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-4 or p-5

inputs.text: w-full h-14 rounded-xl bg-gray-100 border-transparent px-4 text-base font-medium text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-500 focus:bg-white focus:border-[#2BBFB3] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2BBFB3]/20 transition-all
inputs.file: w-full h-32 rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 bg-gray-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-gray-500 focus:border-[#2BBFB3] focus:bg-[#2BBFB3]/5

map.container: w-full h-full min-h-[300px] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm border border-gray-100 relative z-0

bottom_nav.container: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white border-t border-gray-100 pb-safe px-6 flex justify-around items-center h-16 sm:h-20 z-50
bottom_nav.item_inactive: text-gray-400 flex flex-col items-center gap-1 hover:text-gray-600

interactions.transitions: Use fast, snappy transitions. transition-all duration-200 ease-out.
interactions.loading: Use simple pulsing elements or standard Lucide-React Loader2 spinning.
interactions.hover: Since it is mobile-first, rely more on active states (active:scale-95, active:bg-gray-100) than hover states.

splash_background.usage: Can be used as an atmospheric background for the initial Auth/Splash screen, with a heavy white or black overlay (bg-white/80 or bg-black/60) to keep text readable.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons, links, and form inputs MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case based on their role (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='request-pickup-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text is only used on #2BBFB3 or dark backgrounds. Ensure black text is used on #C8F135. Do not use pure transparent headers if content scrolls behind them; use backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80.

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK: React (or Next.js), Tailwind CSS, Lucide React, React Leaflet (for maps), Supabase (Auth, DB, Storage).
UX FOCUS: One primary action per screen. Huge CTA buttons. Minimal forms.

MOBILE APP SHELL: Wrap the root layout in `<div className='w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] relative flex flex-col bg-gray-50 overflow-hidden sm:border sm:shadow-2xl'>`. Everything must happen inside this container to simulate a native app on desktop.
MAP INTEGRATION: Use Leaflet (`react-leaflet`) for displaying request locations. Ensure the map does not overlap with fixed bottom navigation or bottom sheets.

CAMERA/GPS: For the recycler's 'Subir Evidencia' flow, use standard HTML5 `<input type='file' accept='image/*' capture='environment' />` to trigger the camera, and `navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition` for GPS coords.
SUPABASE AUTH: Ensure persistent session is maintained. Role distinction (USER vs RECYCLER) must happen at sign-up and control the routing (Home Hogar vs Home Reciclador).
STATE ENUM: Adhere strictly to these states: PENDING, ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, EVIDENCE_UPLOADED, COMPLETED.
DO NOT USE MOCK DATA. Use actual Supabase calls.
